stories.title: Copy of Golden Knights win Game 1 thriller: Grades and big...
stories.summary: The opening Cup Final matchup was not for the faint of heart. Here's what it all means.

stories.title: Hertl caps rally in third as Knights swipe Game 1
stories.summary: Tomas Hertl scored 16:36 into the third period, his fourth goal of the postseason, and the Vegas Golden Knights overcame an early deficit to defeat the Carolina Hurricanes 5-4 in Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Final on Tuesday night at Lenovo Center.

stories.title: Eagles LT after Brown trade: 'Thank God it's over'...
stories.summary: There was a mixed reaction to receiver A.J. Brown's departure by his former Eagles teammates Tuesday, ranging from a sense of loss to relief that the saga is now in the rearview mirror.

stories.title: Rams 'aggressive' about rare shot to land Garrett
stories.summary: Coach Sean McVay said the Rams felt fortunate to have had the chance to acquire Myles Garrett and compared it to the deal that landed them Matthew Stafford.

stories.title: Shades of Jose: Ball bonks off Adell's head for HR...
stories.summary: Angels right fielder Jo Adell had a Jose Canseco moment Tuesday night, as a fly ball bounced off his head and went over the right-field fence for a Rockies home run.
